details.test: Task 1: Register 8-year-old in weekday beginner swim class in July under $120
Task 2: Add one evening adult yoga class and one evening adult cycling class under $30 each to the cart
Task 3: Purchase the cheapest monthly resident fitness centre membership starting on August 1 with Pay at Front Desk
Task 4: Register for the earliest free weekend family event at Riverside Community Center in September
Task 5: Change an existing 5:00 PM youth basketball registration at Central Gym to a 7:00 PM session at the same location
Task 6: Register two siblings for the same August soccer camp at North Field Complex with at least 2 spots left
Task 7: Register a teen for a half-day morning spring break art camp between March 25-29 under $200
Task 8: Buy a 10-visit indoor pool punch pass for an adult household member without auto-renew
Task 9: Save three affordable Saturday preschool programs at Downtown Community Center to favorites
